economic_notes: Yale First Nation has investments in Cascade Lower Canyon Community Forest Limited Partnership (33%), Stelmexw Enterprises LP (99%), and Smemela:lh Group Management Ltd. (100%), all accounted for using modified equity method. Economic development and employment segment generated $1,029,610 in revenue.
notes: Administration & Education segment expenses ($765,144) include both admin and education combined - cannot be separated. Health & Social Development also combined. Restricted cash of $85,085 includes CMHC replacement reserve ($35,085) and supplemental assistance subsidy ($50,000). YFN consolidates Y.F.N. Developments Inc. as a subsidiary. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Funds held in Ottawa Trust ($111,168) recorded on balance sheet with offsetting accumulated surplus. BMO Fixed Rate Term Loan of $2,673,558 is new in 2022.
